title: munnozia harlingii
intro: Munnozia harlingii, also known as Harling's Munnozia, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family native to Ecuador. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antimalarial and antibacterial activities, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Munnozia harlingii include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive problems, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Munnozia harlingii can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
